name: Expenses Reimbursement
text: Unless otherwise explicitly agreed in writing, all expenses incurred by the Service Provider in the performance of the services under this Agreement shall be borne solely by the Service Provider.
invalid_if: The clause is vague or ambiguous, making it unenforceable.
It contravenes specific statutory provisions applicable to the nature of services rendered.
It is established that the clause was entered into under coercion, undue influence, or fraud.
title: Service Expenses
dispute_hotspots: Business class travel claimed without approval
